scores.correctness_notes: All three sections (services, checks, log-targets) are structurally correct and match the gold standard. Required fields present: override, command, startup, on-check-failure linking check to service, HTTP check with correct fields, Loki log target with correct location URL format and services list.
scores.hallucination_notes: backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit, kill-delay are valid Pebble service fields (not hallucinated). All other fields match known Pebble spec. No invented APIs or parameters detected.
